title: verbascum pedunculosum
intro: Verbascum pedunculosum, also known as the hoary mullein, is a biennial plant in the figwort family that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant's health benefits include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. The herb can be prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
